meta.title: Employer Branding & Founder-Led Content Studio
meta.description: A tech insider who knows how to tell your startup's story. Employer branding, founder marketing, and social strategy for technology companies.

hero.headline: Not another social agency.
hero.headlineEmphasis: A tech insider who knows how to tell your story.
hero.subheadline: I help technology companies turn their people, culture and technology into stories that attract talent, build trust and create brands people want to be part of.

problem.title: Who owns your company's story?
problem.body: It falls between marketing, HR, and operations — without the experience, strategy, or KPIs to make it work. And hiring a full-time owner is expensive.
problem.goodNews: The good news: now it has an owner

cards.title: One dedicated owner
cards.body: One (wo)man show: strategy → filming → editing → publishing, end-to-end. Your story stops falling between departments.

cards.title: The missing expertise
cards.body: Years inside tech companies + gen z social expertise — with a real strategy and KPIs behind every post.

cards.title: A fraction of the cost
cards.body: Professional results at a fraction of a full-time social media manager's salary.

series.title: Content Series
series.subtitle: Ongoing series, not one-off clips, built to keep your audience coming back for the next episode.

items.title: CEO & Entrepreneur
items.description: A founder who's living the dream

difference.title: Most agencies learn about technology companies.
difference.body:
I don't need to learn how startup culture works.

I was part of it.

I understand the people behind the products, the challenges founders face, and what makes technical talent connect with a company.
difference.highlight: Tech background + storytelling expertise + owned community.

items.name: Employer Branding
items.description: Turn your people and culture into stories people want to watch.

items.name: Founder-Led Marketing
items.description:
People connect with people.

Build founders into recognizable voices through:

items.name: Talent Attraction
items.description: Build relationships with future candidates before they start searching.

cards.title: Tech Insider
cards.body:
I am not a marketer trying to understand tech.

I come from the startup ecosystem.

cards.title: Owned Tech Community
cards.body:
30K+ followers.

70%+ tech audience.

A trusted community instead of paid reach.

cards.title: End-to-End Partner
cards.body:
One strategic partner from idea to execution.

Strategy. Creative. Production. Publishing.

cards.title: Gen Z Native
cards.body: I understand how the next generation of talent consumes content and what makes people stop scrolling.

workflow.title: How we work
workflow.subtitle: A complete content partner from strategy to publishing

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: Understand your company, culture, hiring goals and audience.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.description: Build content pillars, formats, calendar and KPIs.

steps.title: Production
steps.description: Filming days at your offices. Creating authentic content.

steps.title: Distribution
steps.description: Publish through your channels and amplify through my tech community.

steps.title: Growth
steps.description: Analyze performance. Improve formats. Scale what works.

items.name: LAUNCH
items.subtitle: One-time Employer Branding Activation
items.description: For startups that want to introduce their story and get noticed.
includes: One premium video published through my community channels
items.goal: Create awareness and introduce your company to the right audience.

items.name: BOOST
items.subtitle: Ongoing Employer Branding Partnership
items.description: For companies that want to build visibility and attract talent consistently.
items.goal: Build a recognizable employer brand that attracts the right people before hiring starts.

contentTypes.title: Content formats I create
contentTypes.subtitle: From founder moments to team celebrations, every piece of content builds your brand.

items.name: Employee Stories
items.description: Authentic stories of people behind your product. Voices that attract talent.

items.name: Behind the Scenes
items.description: Show the real culture. Office moments, collaboration, and work that matters.

items.name: Day in the Life
items.description: Take followers inside your company. A day from the perspective of your team.

items.name: Tech Content
items.description: Engineering insights, product demos, and technical thought leadership.

items.name: Founder Stories
items.description: Build your founder as a recognizable voice. Vision, journey, and lessons learned.

items.name: Company Milestones
items.description: Launch announcements, funding news, and victories worth celebrating.

items.name: Team Moments
items.description: Culture in action. Team wins, celebrations, and human connection.

items.name: Events & Community
items.description: Happy hours, offsites, meetups. The moments that build community.

companies.title: Trusted by top tech companies
companies.subtitle: Companies building the future trust me with their stories.

sociofeed.description: A mix of content types that build momentum and attract top talent.

finalcta.headline: Your company already has a story.

credibility.highlight: Built a 30K+ tech community through Ofoodiez

gate.meta_description: By invitation only. Enter your access code.
gate.hint: Your access code was sent to you with the proposal — codes are valid for 1 week.
gate.denied_hint: Wrong code. Check your proposal and try again.
gate.expired_body: This code's one-week window has closed. Proposals don't wait forever — ping me and I'll reopen your access.

quote.label: Heard in the field
quote.text: 60% of candidates check a company's Instagram and LinkedIn before applying. If nothing's there, they reject you before you even meet.
